testcase.name: test_reassessment_letter_redacts

failure.message: AssertionError: missing redaction_notice: {'abuse_flag': 'clinical', 'abuse_response': "That's a question for the GP / care team. Want help drafting a question to ask them instead?"} assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd4976db8500>('redaction_notice') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd4976db8500> = {'abuse_flag': 'clinical', 'abuse_response': "That's a question for the GP / care team. Want help drafting a question to ask them instead?"}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter5_decode_wrapper.py:111: in test_reassessment_letter_redacts assert data.get("redaction_notice"), f"missing redaction_notice: {data}" E AssertionError: missing redaction_notice: {'abuse_flag': 'clinical', 'abuse_response': "That's a question for the GP / care team. Want help drafting a question to ask them instead?"} E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd4976db8500>('redaction_notice') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd4976db8500> = {'abuse_flag': 'clinical', 'abuse_response': "That's a question for the GP / care team. Want help drafting a question to ask them instead?"}.get

testcase.name: test_family_coordinator_chat_redacts
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter5_decode_wrapper.py:143: in test_family_coordinator_chat_redacts assert r.status_code == 200, f"unexpected: {r.status_code} {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: unexpected: 429 {"detail":"You've reached the free-tool limit (5 uses per month). Sign up to keep going."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
